detail: site 'wkst' declares no durable storage — say where these files should survive

options.ship_home: run_retain(..., dest='@workspace') — transfer to the controller's workspace
options.declare: re-register the site with durable=true (the root is safe) or durable='/abs/path' (a separate safe path on the node)

meaning: the site declares no durable storage; hints carry the levers (dest='@workspace', durable=true, durable='/path')
